title: scutellaria pallidiflora
intro: Scutellaria pallidiflora is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Asia. It is also known as pale skullcap, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria pallidiflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Scutellaria pallidiflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also available in dried form for use in herbal remedies.
